<!-- indicator: tbl-at-least-1-bup-aar -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-at-least-1-bup-aar
#| tbl-cap: 'Patients Who Received at Least One Buprenorphine Prescription for Opioid Use Disorder, Age-Adjusted Rate per 100,000 Population, 2020–2023'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-at-least-1-bup-aar", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("tbl-at-least-1-bup-aar", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
